meaning: adj.(指动物)驯服的、柔顺的,(指人)没精打彩的、顺从的,被开垦的,沉闷的,乏味的,平淡的vt.驯养,驯服,制服,使变得平淡vi.变得驯服
examples: They never became tame; they would run away if you approached them.
These ideas may seem tame today, but they were inflammatory in his time.
Tame EU inflation that fell to its lowest level in three years was also reported Tuesday.
Hamlin as Perseus struggled to tame a white-winged Pegasus and to battle the snake-haired Medusa.
